title: Audit Comp | Folks Finance: Wormhole NTT on Algorand Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed analysis of three critical security vulnerabilities in the Folks Finance Wormhole NTT on Algorand, including proper proof of concepts and recommendations. The content is clear, concise, and relevant to the requirements.
audit.improvements: The report could benefit from a more comprehensive explanation of the implications of each vulnerability and potential mitigation strategies. Additionally, including a section on how the vulnerabilities were discovered and any testing methodologies used would strengthen the report.
